# route-specs-for-review
Description: Automate the process of pulling spec results, writing final documentation, and routing them for review.
Source: project
1. Initiate the documentation generation process.
2. The system will pull the results for all specified documents.
3. Final documentation will be written to the designated output directory.
4. The paths to the generated documents will be provided.
5. Review the generated documents and confirm satisfaction.
6. Upon confirmation, the documents will be routed through the specified review system.
